meta.title: The Air Force says the B-21 could be ready to fight NEXT YEAR
meta.description:
A new article published by Air and Space Forces Magazine suggests the first test-article B-21 Raider stealth bombers could be ready to fight as soon as next year if they're needed. 

You can read their original reporting here: 
https://www.airandspaceforces.com/air-force-test-b-21s-could-fly-combat-missions-northrop-can-expand-production-at-plant-42/
